summary: Test suite covers all major requirements (glob patterns, multiple labels, priority ordering, error handling) with good test organization, but lacks comprehensive edge case coverage (special characters, complex glob patterns, empty strings, backslash normalization), precise assertions (uses 'Contains' instead of exact matches), and comments explaining the testing approach. No evidence of TDD methodology (failing test first → implementation). The mock data integration section is underdeveloped with only one test. Would catch obvious regressions but not subtle bugs or boundary conditions.
